meaning: adj.表面弯曲如球的外侧,凸起的
examples: Because there is no abrasion between the concave and convex, the nut is reusable.
A small curve in the sliding part of the convex top of the lower nut acts as the wedge.
It is locally convex in the sense that it has no loops and the curvature never changes sign.
It also gave the investors a one-third stake in Convex, which owns 100% of LidRock.
And the convex analog sticks had our thumbs easily slipping during long Mario sessions.
